search_signals.author: deltasage_ai
search_signals.text: "Each Bitcoin 200-week moving average touch has preceded exponential rallies, but 2026 sentiment is dismissive despite a historically bullish setup. Consensus believes BTC will correct to allow a 'proper' MA touch before the next bull phase. This is understandable. It worked in 2015, 2018, and 2022.
